$comment: Web Everything assembler preset registry (#646/#667). Each entry is a shadcn-shaped registry-item: an ejectable recipe of plain-markup files that composes WE blocks/intents. The recipe IS the standard (#652 Fork 1) — no tool required to consume it. /presets/ renders this file; new presets are added as batch-time volume.

presets.name: reveal-nav
presets.title: Reveal navigation menu
presets.description: W3C APG Disclosure Navigation header: a row of section heads, each a real <button aria-expanded> disclosing its own panel. CSS baseline reveals on :hover/:focus-within; reveal-nav.js layers aria-expanded toggling + Esc/outside-click. This is the exact payload running live in the Web Everything dogfood header.

cem.name: RevealNav
cem.description: Composed-API surface of the reveal-nav preset — a W3C APG Disclosure Navigation header. Describes the authoring surface (#668), never the internal reveal-nav.js wiring. Rides the #653 CEM protocol.

attributes.name: aria-expanded
attributes.description: Disclosure state of each section head button — "true" while its panel is open.

attributes.name: aria-controls
attributes.description: Each section head points at the id of the panel it discloses.

slots.description: Nav sections — each a head <button> plus its disclosed panel of <a class="nav-link"> links.

x-webeverything.note: A composition, not a registered custom element — the CEM coexists with the plain-markup recipe (#652 Fork 1's API-descriptor layer).
